rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ANA E. GOMEZ REVOCABLE INTERVIVOS TRUST OF 1998 DATE 12/9/1998
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent Arturo Salumes Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Diane Achermann'S Petition (1) To Invalidate Trust Amendment, (2) To Remove Current Trustees, (3) To Confirm Diane Achermann As Trustee, (4) For An Accounting, (5) For Return Of Property To Trust, (6) For Double Damages, And (7) For Attorneys Fees And Costs; And Reqeust For Judicial Notice
